rationale: Reconfirmed at 18b2624a. git show --name-only lists the 6 expected files (5 prior + internal/panel/panel_test.go); still ONE commit (d327cdce..18b2624a). The prod diff over panel.go/create.go/panel_test.go(cmd)/create_test.go/interfaces.md is EMPTY — the sole delta vs round 1 is internal/panel/panel_test.go (+85, additive). That new test soundly extends 112's decision-inert pin to all five real gate enum values across Allow and Block scenarios, keeping internal/panel config-free by mirroring the literals. go build ./... and go test ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel are green; 112 pins unmodified; worktree clean. My round-1 APPROVE stands.

findings.detail: 18b2624a = single commit d327cdce..18b2624a; name-only shows exactly the 6 files.
git diff d327cdce 18b2624a over the 5 prod/spec paths is EMPTY; only internal/panel/panel_test.go added (+85 lines, --stat).

New TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues asserts PanelGateDecision Action+Message and ApproveThreshold() are identical across all five gate enum values plus "", over Allow + stale-SHA Block scenarios; preserves config-free-leaf invariant via hardcoded mirrored literals.
go build ./... clean; go test ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel both ok; git status clean at HEAD 18b2624a; 112 R9 stable contract intact.
